MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2007 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON NOV-13-2007 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 501, RONALD E QUIDACHAY. JUDGE: MARY E. WISS, CLERK: EBURA, REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)

COURT TRIAL HELD ON NOV-13-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 501. THE COURT, HAVING HEARD ORAL ARGUMENT FROM COUNSEL, THE COURT SUSTAINS THE OBJECTION SINCE THERE IS NOT A VALID PROOF OF SERVICE AND PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO HEAR THE MATTER BY OFFER OF PROOF IS DENIED. THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE FOR LACK OF SERVICE. JUDGE RONALD QUIDACHI, CLERK CARLA AMADOR, NO REPORTED. (DEPARTMENT 501)
NTC OF MTN AND MTN FOR ORDER VACATING DISMISSAL, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC HEARING SET FOR JUN-10-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING DISMISSAL. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED NO EVIDENCE OF DILIGENCE IN MOVING FOR RELIEF UNDER CCP 473(B) BILLINGS V. HEALTH PLAN OF AMERICA (1990) 225 CAL. APP. 3RD 250, 254-255. MOREOVER, PLAINTIFF'S DISMISSAL WAS VOLUNTARY RATHER THAN A RESULT OF MISTAKE, SURPRISE, INADVERTANCE OR NEGLECT. CCP 473(B) DOES NOT APPLY TP PLAINTIFF'S VOLUNTARY ACT IN DISMISSING THE CASE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
